title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: Project Lightwell is IBM and Red Hat's initiative to secure the open source ecosystem using AI-augmented engineers and a trusted security clearinghouse. It addresses growing cyberattacks on open source software that powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies.
